help.description: Resistor ideal. Valor de resistência configurável em Ω. Limitador de corrente e divisor de tensão.

source.notes: Comp2Pin m_area=QRectF(-11,-4.5,22,9), pins at (-16,0)/(16,0); Resistor setLength(4.4) so Pin draws length-0.7=3.7. Default SimulIDE ansi=false draws drawRect(m_area) with Component pen width 1.5 and white brush; ansi=true draws seven 2px zigzag segments from -12..12.

help.description: Capacitor ideal. Valor de capacitância configurável em Farads. Armazena energia no campo elétrico.

source.notes: CapacitorBase m_area=QRectF(-10,-8,20,16), inherited Comp2Pin pins (-16,0)/(16,0); setLength(12) so Pin draws length-0.7=11.3. Capacitor::paint uses pen width 3 and drawLine(-3,-6,-3,6), drawLine(3,-6,3,6).

Inductor m_area=QRectF(-10,-6,20,12), inherited Comp2Pin pins (-16,0)/(16,0); setLength(4) so Pin draws length-0.7=3.3. paint uses pen width 2 and drawArc QRectF(-12,-4.5,10,10),(-5,-4.5,10,10),(2,-4.5,10,10) with spans 220,-270,-220.

help.description: Ponto de junção elétrica entre 3 ou mais fios. Coloque sobre um fio para criar uma derivação.
Conecta pinos por nome compartilhado em vez de fio desenhado. Dois túneis com o mesmo nome formam um nó elétrico.
Sonda de tensão de um pino. Mostra o valor de tensão em tempo real e muda de cor conforme o threshold lógico configurado.

source.notes: Non-small Probe uses m_area QRect(-12,-8,20,16), input IoPin(180,QPoint(-22,0)) with length 14 when rotation is not multiple of 90, and paint draws ellipse QRect(-8,-8,16,16). Constructor setRotation(-45) is not represented yet because LasecSimul component rotation is restricted to 0/90/180/270.
setValLabelPos(16,0,45) translated by bounds (-22,-8). Rotation 45 is not representable by current external label rotation enum.

help.description: Amperímetro de baixa resistência série. Conecte em série no ramo para medir a corrente que passa por ele.

source.notes: Meter::paint draws a black rounded rect at QRectF(-24,-24,48,32). QGraphicsSimpleTextItem is Ubuntu Mono bold pixelSize 13, yellow, pos(-22,-22). Pins are Pin(270,QPoint(-8,16)), Pin(270,QPoint(8,16)) and IoPin(0,QPoint(32,-8)); these QPoint values are the electrical terminal positions, so package pins use leadOrigin=terminal and Pin::paint trim 0.7.

help.description: Voltímetro diferencial. Conecte os dois pinos de medição nos nós desejados para ler a tensão entre eles.

source.notes: Same Meter base geometry as Ampmeter. The subclass only changes m_unit to V and initial display text to ' 0.000\n V'.

help.description: Frequencímetro: mede a frequência do sinal digital no pino de entrada e mostra em Hz.

source.notes: m_area is QRectF(-32,-10,85,20) and paint draws the same rounded rect filled black. Display is Ubuntu Mono bold pixelSize 13, yellow, pos(-30,-6). Input pin is Pin(180,QPoint(-40,0)); QPoint is electrical terminal and visual lead reaches the rect after Pin::paint trim 0.7.

help.description: Osciloscópio de até 4 canais. Conecte os pinos CH1–CH4 para visualizar formas de onda analógicas em tempo real.

source.notes: Collapsed PlotBase: m_baSize=135, screen=143x143, widgetSize=215x147, proxy pos(-78,-71), m_area(-80,-73,219,153). Package bounds include left IoPin terminals at x=-88.

help.description: Analisador lógico de 8 canais digitais. Captura e exibe transições de sinal com timestamp em nanosegundos.

source.notes: Same collapsed PlotBase dimensions as Oscope, with 8 QLineEdit channel boxes and 8 input IoPins at QPoint(-88,-64+16*i).

help.description: Fonte de tensão CC ideal com dois pinos (+ e −). A tensão configurada é mantida constante independente da corrente.

source.notes: non-small: m_area=QRect(-10,-10,20,20); IoPin(0,QPoint(16,0)); drawRoundedRect(-8,-8,16,16,2,2); brush #ffa600 when Out=true else #e6e6ff

help.description: Fonte de tensão fixa de um pino referenciada ao GND. Útil como trilho de alimentação (VCC, 3.3 V, etc.).
Gerador de clock digital (onda quadrada 50% duty cycle). Frequência configurável em Hz.

source.notes: ClockBase m_area=QRect(-14,-8,22,16), IoPin(0,QPoint(16,0)); Clock::paint roundedRect(m_area,2,2), fill #fac832 running else #e6e6ff, then pulse polyline with pen width 1.

help.description: Gerador de formas de onda: senoidal, triangular, quadrada. Configure frequência e amplitude.

source.notes: ClockBase m_area=QRect(-14,-8,22,16); out pin (16,0), gnd pin (16,4) visible only when Bipolar=true; drawRoundedRect(m_area,2,2); drawPixmap(m_area.x()+3,m_area.y()+4,16,8,*m_wavePixmap).

help.description: Fonte de tensão variável controlável via slider durante a simulação. Referenciada ao GND.

source.notes: VarSource m_area=(-20,-28,40,56), proxy SourceWidget at (-18,-26), dial 36x36 at top, CustomButton 32x16 centered at y=10, out pin at (28,16). Widget primitives are converted from generic Qt paint calls: drawRoundedRect/drawEllipse/drawLine/QLinearGradient/QRadialGradient.

help.description: Fonte de corrente variável controlável durante a simulação. Injeção de corrente constante no nó.

source.notes: VarSource m_area=(-20,-28,40,56), proxy SourceWidget at (-18,-26), dial 36x36 at top, CustomButton 32x16 centered at y=10, out pin at (28,16). Widget primitives are converted from generic Qt paint calls: drawRoundedRect/drawEllipse/drawLine/QLinearGradient/QRadialGradient.

help.description: Fonte controlada por tensão ou corrente (VCCS/VCVS/CCCS/CCVS). Configure tipo e ganho.

source.notes: Csource::paint draws outline-only rect/diamond/arrow. Leads are rendered from Pin::paint: Pin QPoint is the electrical terminal, visual segment length is m_length-0.7 with round cap. Control +/- are Pin labels: cp/cm at (-24,-8)/(-24,8), angle 180, length 8, setFontSize(9), setSpace(1.7), labelColor red/black; labels are cleared when CurrControl=true.
setValLabelPos(4,18,0) translated by simulidePaint bounds (-24,-20) => package coordinates (28,38).

help.description: Bateria com resistência série interna configurável. Modelo de fonte real com queda de tensão sob carga.
Trilho de alimentação (power rail): fio virtual que distribui a mesma tensão para múltiplos pontos sem fios desenhados.

source.notes: m_area=QRect(-2,-8,12,16); IoPin(0,QPoint(16,0)); setRotation(90); paint polygon points (-1.5,-6.5),(-1.5,6.5),(9,1),(9,-1), brush #ffa600. Lasec package keeps the local paint geometry and exposes the pin at the translated QPoint(16,0).
m_area = QRect(-8,-10,16,12); IoPin(90,QPoint(0,-16)); bars at y=-8,-4,0 with pen 2.5

help.description: Referência de 0 V (GND/terra) do circuito. Todo circuito precisa de pelo menos um terra para o solver MNA funcionar.
